description: RSI Mean Reversion sur QQQ (NASDAQ 100 ETF) 1H. Le QQQ alterne phases de tendance et de consolidation — les extrêmes RSI en consolidation offrent des points d'entrée mean-reversion avec excellent R:R. RSI court (10) pour capturer les micro-cycles intra-daily.

entry_rules.long: RSI(10) crosses above 33 (was below) — oversold bounce
entry_rules.short: RSI(10) crosses below 67 (was above) — overbought reversal

exit_rules.long: stop_loss(-0.9%) OR take_profit(+2.0%) OR trailing_stop(0.6% from peak)
exit_rules.short: stop_loss(+0.9%) OR take_profit(-2.0%) OR trailing_stop(0.6% from trough)
